item.title: Oil prices soar and stock prices fall as US-Israel war with Iran rattles markets
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran have sent a chill through world markets, with U.S. futures falling more than 1%

item.title: OPEC+ boosts oil production after attacks on Iran and throughout region
item.description: Oil prices have jumped as U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. military installations around the Gulf ripp...

item.title: FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
item.description: Authorities say a gunman wearing clothes with an Iranian flag design and the words “Property of Allah” killed two people and wounded 14 at a Texas bar

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson returns home to South Carolina to lie in state
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. is returning to South Carolina for a final public farewell

item.title: The Latest: US, Israel pound Iran as Trump signals willingness to talk to new leadership
item.description: Israel launched strikes on Iran while Tehran responded by firing drones and missiles at Jerusalem and U.S. military installations
